name: Rogz Dog ginz-Treat Ball 7.8cm – Pink Large
shortDescription: Interactive treat-dispensing ball for medium and large dogs. Rogz Dog Grinz combines chewing, fetching, and water-friendly fun in one toy.
description: The Rogz Grinz Treat Ball (Large, Pink) is a multi-functional toy designed to keep dogs active, engaged, and entertained. With its durable SEBS rubber construction, this ball offers the perfect balance of firmness for bouncing and softness to protect teeth during chewing. Dogs can chase, fetch, and roll the ball, or enjoy the challenge of retrieving treats from inside. At 7.8 cm in diameter, it’s perfect for medium and large breeds, providing mental stimulation while encouraging physical activity. Its floating capability makes it an excellent choice for water games, ensuring versatile play both indoors and outdoors. Key Features: Holds treats for interactive play and problem-solving Safe, non-toxic rubber material suitable for all adult dogs Medium firmness to prevent tooth damage Ideal for fetch, chew, and water play Lightweight (4.8 ounces) and easy to carry for active sessions
